summary: 2020-2025宏观统计不支持大规模净岗位消失:OECD称'几乎没有证据显示AI正导致岗位流失';Yale Budget Lab追踪显示ChatGPT发布33个月后职业结构未见可辨别扰动;BLS预测2023-33就业仍净增3.1%且'暴露不等于命运';AI归因裁员2025年约5.5万,仅占总裁员117万的一小部分。真实的边缘反例:Stanford/ADP微观数据发现最高AI暴露职业的22-25岁入门级就业相对下降13%——破坏效应集中于入门级细分,而非总量。总体与'任务重组而非净消失'一致。

evidence.title: OECD Employment Outlook 2025
evidence.quote: little evidence so far that AI is leading to job losses

evidence.title: Yale Budget Lab: Evaluating the Impact of AI on the Labor Market
evidence.quote: the occupational mix has not experienced a discernible disruption since ChatGPT's release

evidence.title: BLS: AI impacts in BLS employment projections
evidence.quote: Exposure is not destiny: many highly exposed occupations are projected to grow

evidence.title: Stanford Digital Economy Lab: Canaries in the Coal Mine?
evidence.quote: 13% relative decline in employment for early-career workers in the most AI-exposed jobs
evidence.note: 关键反例:入门级细分的真实下滑

evidence.title: CNBC/Challenger: AI was behind over 50,000 layoffs in 2025
evidence.quote: nearly 55,000 job cuts were directly attributed to AI... out of a total 1.17 million layoffs

evidence.title: ITIF: AI's Job Impact — Gains Outpace Losses
evidence.quote: about 119,900 direct jobs (created in 2024) vs approximately 12,700 jobs lost due to AI

open_questions: 入门级(22-25岁)下滑的因果是否能与利率/科技业超招回调分离
缺少Eurostat/ILO口径的2020-2025职业结构分解(样本偏美)

summary: AI归因裁员真实存在且快速增长:2025年明确归因AI的裁员5.5万(两年12倍,占总裁员约5%,且因自愿申报机制很可能被低估);实例充分(Amazon 1.4万并明言AI将缩编、Salesforce客服9000→5000、CrowdStrike/HP/Chegg/Oracle;翻译业净减约2.8万岗)。但:占总裁员比例仍小、依赖企业自我归因(AI-washing双向失真)、缺2020-2022基线、未知被裁者是否再就业(净消失vs再配置未分离)。对父观点构成真实但局部的削弱:破坏集中于特定职业与入门级,不足以证成'大规模净消失'。

evidence.title: CNBC/Challenger: AI cited in ~55,000 layoffs in 2025
evidence.quote: more than 12 times the number two years earlier

evidence.title: Fortune: Amazon CEO Jassy — AI will mean fewer corporate jobs
evidence.quote: we expect that this will reduce our total corporate workforce

evidence.title: Fortune: Salesforce cut 4,000 support jobs as Agentforce handles 50%
evidence.quote: support workforce has shrunk from 9,000 to 5,000

evidence.title: Stanford Digital Economy Lab: Canaries in the Coal Mine?
evidence.quote: 13% relative decline in employment for early-career workers in the most AI-exposed jobs

evidence.title: CNN: translators losing jobs to AI (Oxford estimate)
evidence.quote: roughly 28,000 more jobs for translators would've been added in the absence of machine translation

evidence.title: CFO Dive: AI-driven cuts likely underreported (Challenger)
evidence.quote: WARN Act does not require employers to state any reason

open_questions: 被裁者再就业率——净消失与再配置未分离
企业自我归因的可靠性(双向AI-washing)

summary: 两条已收线索共同指向:2020-2025总量层面无大规模净岗位消失(宏观统计、职业结构追踪、就业预测一致),AI归因裁员占总裁员约5%;但破坏效应在特定细分真实存在——入门级(22-25岁)高暴露职业相对下降13%、客服/翻译等职业净减、且归因数据可能低估。'岗位内任务重组为主'在总量上成立,需带上'入门级与特定职业存在真实净损失'的限定。微观工作流调整(N-0005)与能力渗透面(N-0002)尚未调查,是当前最大缺口。
open_questions: N-0005:企业内部微观重组证据未调查
入门级下滑的因果分离(利率/超招回调混杂)
